news.title: Waymo and Uber end robotaxi pilot in Phoenix
news.summary: The Waymo self-driving cars deployed in Phoenix for the Uber pilot will remain in use and make autonomous deliveries with DoorDash.

news.title: AeroVironment soars 19% on earnings beat, backlog grows to $1.2 billion
news.summary: Dronemaker AeroVironment's autonomous system revenue beat expectations by $90 million and its backlog continued to grow.

news.title: Alphabet stock pops 4% on Dow debut, but the tech giant faces major AI questions
news.summary: Alphabet shares rose Monday as the company joined the Dow, but the blue-chip milestone comes as the stock remains under pressure.

news.summary: Here are five key things investors need to know to start the trading day.

news.title: SpaceX's $25 billion bond sale drives huge demand - and a potential headache for investors
news.summary: SpaceX’s $25 billion debt sale drew heavy demand, but analysts warn of capital spending, refinancing and investor concentration risks.

news.title: Trump bought as much as $5 million in Axon stock before ICE sought $220 million Taser deal
news.summary: Axon Enterprise has ramped up lobbying in Congress on federal law enforcement technology as ICE pursues a potential $220 million Taser deal.

news.title: The AI boom is colliding with a new threat: Severe weather
news.summary: Heatwaves and severe weather are raising risks for AI data centers, from grid strain to higher insurance and repair costs.

news.title: Baidu shares jump 7% as AI chip arm Kunlunxin said to target $50 billion Hong Kong IPO
news.summary: Baidu's Hong Kong-listed shares rose over 6% amid reports that its AI chip unit Kunlunxin is targeting a $50 billion initial public offering in the city.

news.title: South Korea says Samsung and SK Hynix investing in AI, semiconductor mega-projects
news.summary: Shares of Samsung Electronics and SK Hynix declined after South Korea unveiled sweeping artificial intelligence and semiconductor mega-projects.

news.title: Comcast’s NBC Spinoff Raises Questions About Businesses’ Future
news.summary: Brian Roberts lost out on an opportunity last year to merge NBCUniversal with Warner Bros. Discovery Inc. But the process helped get the chairman and co-chief executive officer of Comcast Corp. thinking about what NBCUniversal would look like on its own.

news.title: Exiled Chinese Tycoon Guo Gets 30 Years in US Prison for Fraud
news.summary: Exiled Chinese tycoon Miles Guo, who promoted himself as a crusader against the communist government in Beijing, was ordered to spend 30 years in a US prison for duping investors out of $1 billion.

news.title: LSEG CEO on AI Market Impact, Share Buybacks, Volatility
news.summary: David Schwimmer, CEO of the London Stock Exchange Group (LSEG), discussed the transformative impact of artificial intelligence on the financial markets. He emphasized that despite a challenging 2025 for shares, AI presents a significant opportunity for LSEG by enhancing the value of its proprietary data, which constitutes over 90% of its dataset. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on ...

news.title: Comcast Plans to Spin Off NBCUniversal in Strategy Reversal
news.summary: Comcast Corp. plans to spin off NBCUniversal and Sky, unwinding a strategy that began more than a decade ago after struggling to demonstrate that a cable and media conglomerate would benefit shareholders.

news.title: South Korean Financial Firms Fight for Share of AI Pay Bonanza
news.summary: South Koreans are getting richer more quickly than anyone else in the world, creating an unprecedented opportunity for the country’s asset managers.

news.title: Nasdaq 100 Jumps More Than 2% as Dip Buyers Lift Tech Stocks
news.summary: Bargain hunters emerged to pick up beaten-down technology stocks on Monday, helping US stocks rally from last week’s declines.

news.title: US Equities Poised for Best Quarterly Performance in Six Years
news.summary: Meera Pandit, Executive Director of Global Market Strategist at JPMorgan Asset Management, joined the program to discuss the strong finish to the quarter for US equities. The segment highlighted that US stock markets are on track to deliver their best quarterly performance in six years, reflecting positive momentum and investor confidence as the quarter closes. She speaks with Romaine Bostick & Ka...

news.title: Supreme Court Says Warrant Needed for Phone Location Data
news.summary: The Supreme Court placed limits on a law enforcement investigative technique that leverages data on cell phone users’ location history to identify people near a crime scene.

news.title: Pimco Sees Fed on Hold for Rest of Year
news.summary: Pimco Head of Short-Term Portfolio Management Jerome Schneider expects the Federal Reserve to not move on interest rates for the rest of this year. He talks about how clients and investors can find growth amid hidden risks on "Bloomberg The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

news.title: Comcast Spinoff Will Be 'Value-Surfacing,' Marangi Says
news.summary: Chris Marangi, president and co-CIO of Gabelli Funds, joins Katie Greifeld, Scarlet Fu, and Eric Balchunas on "Bloomberg ETF IQ." Comcast plans to spin off NBCUniversal and Sky, unwinding a strategy that began more than a decade ago after struggling to demonstrate that a cable and media conglomerate would benefit shareholders. (Source: Bloomberg)

news.summary: Bloomberg’s Ed Ludlow speaks with the CEO of Rocket Lab about the company's biggest bet yet: buying Iridium in an $8 billion deal to challenge SpaceX in the orbital economy. Plus, South Korean firms, including Samsung and SK Hynix will spend at least $880 billion on chips and data centers, as the country seeks to maintain its edge in the AI era; and Anthropic wins US approval to restore some acces...

news.title: Super Micro Raided as Taiwan Expands Chip Smuggling Probe
news.summary: Super Micro Computer Inc.’s offices in Taiwan were raided by government authorities on Monday, widening an investigation into the alleged smuggling of Nvidia Corp. chips into China using the company’s servers, according to a person familiar with the situation. Super Micro’s shares fell as much as 9.2%.

news.title: Uber and Waymo Have Ended Their Robotaxi Tie-Up in Phoenix; Uber to Announce New Partner
news.summary: Uber Technologies Inc. said it has wound down its robotaxi offering with Alphabet Inc.’s Waymo in Phoenix, the latest relationship twist between two companies that simultaneously function as partners and competitors.

news.summary: Get a jump start on the US trading day with Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Open Interest." Comcast is shaking up media, with shares soaring on plans to spin off NBCUniversal and Sky. Tech rebounds as South Korea’s AI spending push lifts chip stocks. Plus, the US . and Iran agree to halt attacks ahead of Doha talks. Tyler Kendall breaks down the Supreme Court’s Fed independence ruling, and Del Monte Cor...

news.title: Alibaba, Tencent Dropped by DC Lobbyists to Comply With US Curbs
news.summary: Washington’s most powerful lobbying firms are rushing to cut ties with Chinese tech giants including Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. and Tencent Holdings Ltd. as new US restrictions reshape the influence game for many Chinese companies.

news.title: Hugging Face CEO Weighs In on Anthropic AI Model's 'Dangerous' Label
news.summary: As government scrutiny over Anthropic's Mythos AI model takes center stage in the public debate over AI's national security concerns, Hugging Face CEO Clem Delangue says being labeled "too dangerous" may actually be good marketing for frontier AI firms. He joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech" to explain. (Source: Bloomberg)

news.title: Bob Iger, Joshua Kushner Discuss NBA Expansion Bid
news.summary: Former Disney CEO Bob Iger and Thrive Capital founder Joshua Kushner have hired investment bankers and discussed making a bid for the National Basketball Association expansion team in Las Vegas, according to sources. Bloomberg's Natasha Mascarenhas joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

news.title: Anthropic's Mythos 5 Gets US Approval for Wider Use
news.summary: Anthropic won US approval to restore some access to its powerful Mythos 5 AI model, after resolving Trump administration concerns about the technology’s potential threats to national security. Theresa Payton, CEO of Fortalice Solutions and former White House CIO, joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech" to discuss how it shows the US is prioritizing national security while still enabling domestic AI ad...

news.title: MrBeast, Top YouTubers Sell Their Scraps at New Age Auction
news.summary: Bidders accustomed to buying prized art or luxury goods were recently introduced to a new category of coveted items at auction: Mementos from the world’s most popular internet stars.

news.title: Dual Perspectives on AI Investment Costs
news.summary: Momei Qu, managing director at PSP Growth, discusses two contrasting viewpoints surrounding AI investments: one emphasizing that the significant scale of investment indicates strong and genuine demand for AI technologies, and the other cautioning that the escalating costs of supporting AI infrastructure continue to rise, increasing the burden of proof for these investments. She speaks on "Bloomber...

news.title: WhatsApp Opens Username Reservations to 3 Billion Users
news.summary: WhatsApp will let the messaging service’s 3 billion global users select a username for their account, a change meant to increase privacy by letting people connect on the platform without having to share their phone number.

news.title: Verizon, BT Merge International Units in Home Markets Pivot
news.summary: Verizon Communications Inc. and the UK’s BT Group Plc agreed to create a joint venture for their international businesses in a merger that will take the low-margin units off their books and allow the carriers to focus on their home markets.

news.title: Ardian Plans to Invest Over €3 Billion in Nordic Data Centers
news.summary: Ardian SAS plans to invest over €3 billion ($3.4 billion) to build data centers in the Nordics, as lower energy prices and ample available land draw more digital infrastructure providers to the region.

news.title: Baidu’s CFO on the Company’s Approach to Recruiting Young Talent
news.summary: In the China tech space, Baidu is now a full-stack player in the AI industry. As the maker of its own chips, AI model (Ernie), cloud system and a self-driving car business (Apollo Go), the tech giant is a very desirable company to work for.  On this episode of the Odd Lots podcast, Baidu CFO Henry He joins Joe Weisenthal and Tracy Alloway to discuss how the company uses AI to evolve its own organi...

news.title: Comcast Shares Surge on Plan to Spin Off NBCUniversal
news.summary: Comcast said it plans to spin off NBCUniversal and Sky into a new publicly traded company as it looks to separate its media businesses from its cable-TV and internet operations. Kelcee Griffis reports on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

news.title: Relx Plans to Buy Back Up to £100 Million in Shares Next Month
news.summary: Relx Plc plans to repurchase shares valued at as much as £100 million ($132.1 million) next month, as the British information and analytics company continues to grapple with concerns that artificial intelligence tools will displace its core research products.

news.title: Amazon’s Rapid Delivery Push Triggers $15 Billion Rout for Eternal, Swiggy
news.summary: Eternal Ltd. and Swiggy Ltd. got the 10-minute delivery party going in India. Now, e-commerce titans Amazon.com Inc. and Walmart Inc.’s Flipkart are looking to crash it.

news.title: Millennium Builds AI Lab in Push for Cutting-Edge Products
news.summary: Millennium Management is setting up an artificial intelligence laboratory to expand the development and application of cutting-edge technologies at the firm.

news.title: Chamath Palihapitiya raises $135M Series A for his AI coding startup, takes CEO role
news.summary: VCs remain thirsty to fund AI coding startups. This one, founded by investor Chamath Palihapitiya, is no exception.

news.title: Gemini’s personalized AI image generation is now free for US users
news.summary: Google is expanding Gemini’s personalized AI image generation to eligible free users in the U.S., allowing the chatbot to create images based on your interests and data from connected Google apps.

news.title: Watch out, Amazon: The Kobo eReader now has a Goodreads rival
news.summary: Kobo users can now automatically sync their reading progress to StoryGraph, making it easier to track books, reading stats, and challenges without relying on Amazon’s Goodreads.

news.title: Waymo and Uber quietly part ways in Phoenix
news.summary: Uber said it is readying the launch of a separate autonomous vehicle partnership in the city, but did not name the partner.

news.title: Anthropic and Gov. Newsom forge deal allowing California government to use Claude at half price
news.summary: As Anthropic forges a closer relationship with the state of California, the federal government has made an enemy out of the OpenAI rival.

news.title: South Korean tech giants commit over $550B to ease ‘RAMageddon’
news.summary: The world's two largest memory chip companies vow to build more memory lab fabs as South Korea positions itself as an AI tech powerhouse country.

news.title: Arena, the AI leaderboard everyone uses, is now a $100M business
news.summary: The startup, which runs a popular free AI leaderboard, launched its commercial service just last September.

news.title: Cursor now has a mobile app for guiding your coding agent on the go
news.summary: Cursor has launched a new mobile app for remote oversight over coding agents.

news.title: Trump administration threatens 92 GW of new electricity supply with red tape
news.summary: The Trump administration's moves threaten $121 billion in new solar and wind power, two energy sources that are the biggest contributors to new capacity in the U.S.

news.title: TIDAL cracks down on AI music by cutting off monetization
news.summary: In addition, TIDAL will use automated tools to remove AI-generated music that attempts to impersonate an artist or a group, the company said.

news.title: In major privacy win, Supreme Court rules geofence warrants are protected by privacy rights
news.summary: The Supreme Court's decision to limit geofence warrants is a win for privacy advocates, who called their use unconstitutional but sought an outright ban.

news.title: WhatsApp now lets you reserve usernames
news.summary: WhatsApp username can be between 3 to 35 characters.

news.title: Rocket Lab continues buying spree by acquiring satellite company Iridium
news.summary: The all-stock deal values Iridium at $8 billion and gives Rocket Lab even more firepower to compete against Amazon and SpaceX.

news.title: Robot hand company settles Tesla trade secret suit and announces $11M raise
news.summary: The startup, Proception, is taking a unique approach to collecting training data to tackle one of the hardest problems in robotics: hands.

news.title: Pocket raises $11M in bet on rising demand for AI note-taking devices
news.summary: Pocket sells a $129 credit card-shaped puck, which sticks to the back of your phone, and promises unlimited recordings, transcriptions, and to-do items.

news.title: Flipper Device’s new Busy Bar is a customizable display for productivity
news.summary: The company's productivity-focused gadget helps you set timers, block apps, and display custom messages and widgets on an LED display.

news.title: Omen AI’s plan to optimize data centers is all wet
news.summary: Omen AI raised a $31 million Series A to monitor chip coolant and stop bacterial outbreaks in data centers.

Discovery's plan to fast-track a standalone Supergirl feature always felt a little dubious. news.title: Leaked iPhone 18 Pro photos reportedly wound up on the dark web
news.summary: Leaked iPhone 18 Pro photos and parts lists appeared on the dark web following a data breach affecting one of Apple's key suppliers, according to a report from Reuters. The leaked images show a drop test of what a source tells Reuters is the iPhone 18 Pro, equipped with a three-camera layout and Apple logo. […]

news.title: Tidal won’t pay royalties on AI-generated music but isn’t banning it outright
news.summary: Tidal shared its new policies regarding AI-generated music today and how the platform plans to "protect artists" and "inform listeners." Instead of banning it outright, starting on July 15th Tidal will label tracks it has identified as being 100 percent AI-generated with an icon. But starting today those tracks will no longer be monetizable. "Tidal's […]

news.title: WhatsApp is launching usernames: here’s how to reserve yours
news.summary: WhatsApp is introducing a new way to add and chat with contacts, without having to share your phone number. Usernames will launch "later this year," in a move to make the communications platform "even more private," allowing you to keep your phone number concealed from people who aren't already in your contacts. news.title: Lawmakers want to ban AI companies from selling your health data
news.summary: A new proposal would ban the sale of Americans' health and location information to data brokers - including information people reveal to an AI chatbot like ChatGPT or Claude. AAPL.fact_check: iPhone 18 Pro 사진 유출은 공식 확인되지 않았으며, 루머로 간주됩니다. Apple의 가격 인상은 공식 발표된 사실입니다.
AAPL.sentiment_reason: Fear & Greed 지수는 낮지만, 분석가들의 평균 목표가와 추천이 긍정적입니다.
AAPL.key_insight: Apple의 주가는 최근 하락했지만, 분석가들은 여전히 긍정적인 목표가를 제시하고 있습니다. 시장의 두려움 지수는 높지만, 이는 단기적인 변동성일 수 있습니다. 장기적으로는 Apple의 혁신과 시장 지배력이 긍정적인 영향을 미칠 가능성이 큽니다.
AAPL.summary_one_line: Apple은 단기적인 시장 변동성에도 불구하고 장기적으로 긍정적인 전망을 유지하고 있습니다.

MSFT.fact_check: MSFT의 8-K 공시는 공식적으로 확인된 사실이며, 다른 뉴스는 MSFT와 직접 관련이 적습니다.
MSFT.sentiment_reason: 분석가의 강력한 매수 추천과 높은 목표가에도 불구하고 시장의 두려움 지수가 높습니다.
MSFT.key_insight: 현재 MSFT의 주가는 분석가 목표가에 비해 상당히 낮은 수준입니다. 이는 잠재적인 상승 여력을 시사합니다. 그러나 시장의 두려움 지수가 높아 단기 변동성에 주의가 필요합니다.
MSFT.recommendation_reason: 분석가의 강력한 매수 추천과 높은 목표가를 고려할 때 장기적으로 긍정적입니다.
MSFT.summary_one_line: MSFT는 분석가의 강력한 매수 추천과 높은 목표가로 장기적 상승 여력이 있습니다.

GOOGL.fact_check: Alphabet의 주가는 Dow 편입으로 상승했으나, AI 관련 문제로 압박을 받고 있습니다. Uber와 Waymo의 로보택시 협력 종료는 공식 발표된 사실입니다.
GOOGL.sentiment_reason: 주가는 상승했지만, Fear & Greed 지수와 Stocktwits 비율이 중립적입니다.
GOOGL.key_insight: Alphabet의 주가는 Dow 지수 편입으로 긍정적인 반응을 보였습니다. 그러나 AI 기술 발전과 관련된 불확실성이 여전히 존재합니다. 투자자들은 AI 분야의 진전을 주의 깊게 살펴봐야 합니다.
GOOGL.recommendation_reason: 주가 상승 요인이 있지만 AI 관련 불확실성이 존재합니다.
GOOGL.summary_one_line: Alphabet의 주가는 Dow 편입으로 상승했으나 AI 관련 불확실성에 주의가 필요합니다.

AMZN.fact_check: Amazon의 인도 시장 진출이 Eternal과 Swiggy에 미치는 영향은 과장된 측면이 있으며, 공식적인 공시로는 확인되지 않았습니다. 그러나 Amazon의 공격적인 시장 확장은 사실입니다.
AMZN.sentiment_reason: 분석가들의 강력한 매수 추천과 긍정적인 주가 상승에도 불구하고, 시장의 두려움 지수와 중립적인 소셜 미디어 반응이 반영되었습니다.
AMZN.key_insight: Amazon은 인도 시장에서의 확장을 통해 새로운 성장 기회를 모색하고 있습니다. 이는 장기적으로 회사의 수익성에 긍정적인 영향을 미칠 수 있습니다. 그러나 단기적으로는 시장의 불확실성과 경쟁 심화가 도전 과제가 될 수 있습니다.
AMZN.recommendation_reason: 분석가들의 강력한 매수 추천과 목표가 상승 여력이 높기 때문입니다.
AMZN.summary_one_line: Amazon의 인도 시장 확장은 장기적인 성장 잠재력을 제공하지만, 단기적인 시장 불확실성은 주의가 필요합니다.

NVDA.fact_check: Super Micro의 칩 밀수 조사 소식은 NVDA와 관련이 있지만, 공식적으로 확인된 사실은 아니다. NVDA의 8-K 공시는 공식적인 정보로 신뢰할 수 있다.
NVDA.sentiment_reason: 분석가의 강력한 매수 추천과 긍정적인 목표가에도 불구하고, 시장의 두려움 지수가 높아 심리가 혼재되어 있다.
NVDA.key_insight: NVIDIA는 AI 인프라 붐과 관련하여 긍정적인 평가를 받고 있다. 그러나 최근의 칩 밀수 조사와 같은 외부 요인은 주가에 영향을 미칠 수 있다. 투자자들은 이러한 외부 요인을 주의 깊게 살펴볼 필요가 있다.
NVDA.recommendation_reason: 시장의 두려움 지수가 높아 단기적으로 관망이 필요하다.
NVDA.summary_one_line: NVIDIA는 AI 인프라 붐에 힘입어 긍정적이지만, 외부 요인에 주의가 필요하다.

META.fact_check: WhatsApp의 사용자명 예약 기능 도입은 공식 발표된 사실이며, 사용자 프라이버시 강화에 기여할 것으로 보입니다. 이는 과장된 주장이 아닌 실제 계획입니다.
META.sentiment_reason: WhatsApp의 새로운 기능 도입과 긍정적인 시장 반응이 종합적으로 긍정적 영향을 미치고 있습니다.
META.key_insight: Meta Platforms는 WhatsApp의 사용자명 예약 기능 도입으로 사용자 프라이버시를 강화하고 있습니다. 이는 사용자 경험을 개선하고 플랫폼의 매력을 높이는 데 기여할 것입니다. 이러한 변화는 장기적으로 사용자 기반 확장에 긍정적 영향을 미칠 수 있습니다.
META.recommendation_reason: WhatsApp의 기능 개선과 긍정적인 시장 반응이 주가 상승에 기여할 가능성이 높습니다.
META.summary_one_line: WhatsApp의 사용자명 기능 도입은 Meta의 사용자 경험을 개선하고 주가 상승에 긍정적 영향을 미칠 수 있습니다.

TSLA.fact_check: Tesla의 주가는 최근 8.46% 상승했으며, 이는 시장의 긍정적인 반응을 반영한 것으로 보입니다. 그러나 현재의 주가가 분석가 평균 목표가에 근접해 있어 추가 상승 여력에 대한 신중한 접근이 필요합니다.
TSLA.sentiment_reason: 전일 대비 주가 상승과 분석가의 '매수' 추천이 긍정적이나, Fear & Greed 지수가 '공포' 상태인 점이 부정적입니다.
TSLA.key_insight: Tesla의 주가는 최근 긍정적인 시장 반응으로 상승했지만, 현재의 주가가 분석가 목표가에 근접해 있어 추가 상승 여력은 제한적일 수 있습니다. 투자자들은 시장의 변동성과 외부 경제 요인에 주목해야 합니다. 특히, AI 및 기술 관련 뉴스가 Tesla의 미래 성장 가능성에 영향을 미칠 수 있습니다.
TSLA.recommendation_reason: 현재 주가가 목표가에 근접해 있어 추가 상승 여력이 제한적일 수 있습니다.
TSLA.summary_one_line: Tesla 주가는 긍정적이지만, 목표가에 근접해 있어 신중한 접근이 필요합니다.

market_summary.market_summary: 오늘 시장은 전반적으로 혼조세를 보이고 있으며, 투자자들은 단기적인 변동성에 주의해야 합니다. 주요 기술주들이 장기적인 성장 잠재력을 가지고 있지만, 외부 요인에 대한 신중한 접근이 필요합니다.
market_summary.top_mover_reason: Apple은 장기적으로 긍정적인 전망을 유지하고 있어 매수 추천을 받고 있습니다.
market_summary.today_strategy: 투자자들은 장기적인 성장 잠재력을 가진 종목에 집중하면서도 단기적인 변동성에 대비해야 합니다. 특히, AI 관련 불확실성과 외부 요인에 주의하며 신중한 투자 결정을 내리는 것이 중요합니다.

daily_insights.Topic_Title: Uber와 Waymo의 로보택시 파트너십 종료와 자율주행 시장의 변화
daily_insights.Full_Summary: Uber와 Waymo가 피닉스에서의 로보택시 파트너십을 종료하면서 자율주행차 시장에 새로운 변화가 예고되고 있다. Uber는 새로운 자율주행차 파트너를 발표할 예정이며, 이는 자율주행 기술의 발전과 시장 경쟁에 중요한 영향을 미칠 것으로 보인다. Waymo는 DoorDash와의 협력을 통해 자율주행차를 활용한 배송 서비스를 계속할 계획이다.
daily_insights.AI_Impact_Reason: Uber와 Waymo의 파트너십 종료는 자율주행차 시장에서의 경쟁을 촉진할 수 있으며, 이는 관련 기업들의 주가에 긍정적인 영향을 미칠 가능성이 있다.
